description: VESA monitor-arm adapter plate: a rectangular plate with the standard 75/100/200/400 mm bolt pattern (round holes or outward adjustment slots), a central arm-interface boss, and a bore through the boss for the arm fixing.
source: VESA FDMI MIS-D/E/F pattern + clearance holes; plate/boss/bore proportions from adapter-plate manufacturers (Ergotron, VIVO, Ergomart)
